title: Market Brief — Thursday, June 25, 2026
summary: GPU compute is loosening fast. Util-avail stands at 36% for A100, 41% for H100, 34% for H200, and 36% for B200, putting every class in comfortable mid-range territory with no scarcity signals anywhere. A100 spot cratered 19.9% day-over-day to $0.80/hr, the sharpest single-day move across all tiers, while H100 and H200 drifted down 3.8% and 1.8% respectively. H100 utilization plunged 19.4pp over 30 days, confirming demand is softening.
paragraphs: GPU compute is loosening fast. Util-avail stands at 36% for A100, 41% for H100, 34% for H200, and 36% for B200, putting every class in comfortable mid-range territory with no scarcity signals anywhere. A100 spot cratered 19.9% day-over-day to $0.80/hr, the sharpest single-day move across all tiers, while H100 and H200 drifted down 3.8% and 1.8% respectively. H100 utilization plunged 19.4pp over 30 days, confirming demand is softening.

At TCO-adjusted costs (1.25x spot), inference on Llama 70B runs $5.06/M on A100, $7.51/M on H100, $8.51/M on H200, and $4.58/M on B200. DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.34/M output is selling at a loss of roughly $4.24/M tokens versus B200 TCO, the cheapest hardware option. OpenAI: Strong on premium tiers. Anthropic: Neutral. Google: Neutral. DeepSeek: Burning Cash. Open-source sub-dollar models: Burning Cash.

B200 is undervalued for inference providers, offering the lowest TCO at $4.58/M with 66% of NeoCloud offerings still free and 92% margin at premium pricing. H100 is overvalued at $2.05/hr spot given utilization collapsing 19.4pp in 30 days; short H100 exposure and rotate capacity contracts to B200.
bullets: 41% util-avail on H100 with a 19.4pp utilization drop in 30 days signals rapid demand erosion.
36% util-avail on B200 yet 66% of advertised NeoCloud offerings sit unrented, showing soft demand despite newest silicon.
$0.80/hr A100 spot after a 19.9% single-day drop marks the cheapest tier across all GPU classes.
21.37 LLMflation index means token pricing has fallen 78.6% from the GPT-4 launch baseline of 100.
$0.18/M output for open-source gpt-oss-120b sits $4.40 below B200 TCO-adjusted cost per million tokens.
107.8% annualized volatility on H200 OCPI makes it the riskiest GPU class for capacity hedging.
